demographics.living_situation: lives alone in a private residence; a concerned neighbour checks in and is present for this call

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have no energy to even lift a spoon, and my legs have blown up like balloons over the last three days. (Neighbour on the call: she hasn't really been eating for weeks and today she can't get herself out of bed at all.)
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The neighbour rang because over the last few days the patient's legs have swelled up badly, she's become too weak to get out of bed, and she's barely been eating for weeks.

symptom_narrative.onset: the leg swelling came on over the last three days; the poor eating and weakness have built up over several weeks
symptom_narrative.duration: weeks of poor eating and increasing weakness; three days of swollen legs
symptom_narrative.character: legs feel heavy and swollen; overwhelming tiredness and no strength; food 'tastes like cardboard' so she has stopped eating; sore, tender gums from dentures that no longer fit
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: she says she has no energy to even lift a spoon and feels completely wiped out
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both lower legs are swollen; the weakness and tiredness are all over
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and slowly getting worse; the legs have swollen further each of the last three days
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: she says she just keeps getting weaker and eats less and less
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: very poor appetite, has lost a lot of weight over recent months, small skin tears that are slow to heal, sore gums and pain when she tries to chew with her dentures; she denies any chest pain, says she can lie flat to sleep without getting breathless, and denies waking at night short of breath
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: the neighbour says she has been going downhill and eating less for a long time but has never swollen up or been this weak before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: acutely unable to get out of bed today; normally gets around slowly with a walking stick

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: upper dentures that no longer fit properly and hurt her gums when she eats
small skin tears on her arms that have been slow to heal

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: has been eating almost nothing for weeks because chewing hurts and food has no taste; barely moving, mostly in bed
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone and is quite isolated; the neighbour says the fridge is nearly empty with only spoiled food, and she has not been able to shop or cook for herself

objective_data_offered.value: about 46 kg on the bathroom scales (neighbour read it out)
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading on a home scale read out by the neighbour; no baseline weight available to confirm the amount of loss

objective_data_offered.value: neighbour says she looks very thin and gaunt with sunken cheeks, and her arms and shoulders look wasted
neighbour says both lower legs are puffy and swollen up to about mid-calf and the skin looks stretched
neighbour reports she has been drinking a little water but eating almost nothing solid for several weeks
